ogTitle: Chilcotts Grass vs Chinderah: Climate Safety

heading: Chilcotts Grass vs Chinderah — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Chilcotts Grass, New South Wales and Chinderah, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Chinderah has a lower overall climate risk score (40/100) compared to Chilcotts Grass (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Chilcotts Grass or Chinderah safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Chilcotts Grass has a flood risk score of 53/100, while Chinderah scores 51/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Chilcotts Grass scores 27/100 for bushfire risk. Chinderah scores 43/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Chilcotts Grass or Chinderah?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Chinderah has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.52% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
